messages.text:
### Reimagining Google Drive with AI

**A New Drive** is a cross-functional initiative focused on transforming Google Drive by integrating AI and collaborative agents into the familiar structure of folders. 

#### Why "A New Drive"?
The project was proposed to address low AI adoption rates in Drive (e.g., <0.7% for AI Mode/Projects and <0.1% for "Help Me Organize"). The core hypothesis is that embedding AI and Agent capabilities directly into folders—a feature almost everyone already uses—will make AI highly intuitive and drastically boost user productivity.

#### Core Focus & Scope
Rather than immediately rebuilding the entire Drive platform, the team is starting with a focused scope: **how to make folders amazing**. Key areas of exploration include:
*   **AI & Agents:** Enhancing collaboration with folder-specific agents that have context, memory, and proactive capabilities.
*   **User Journeys:** Reimagining file navigation (e.g., column views), previews, artifact creation, and folder history (tracking and reverting changes made by both humans and agents).
*   **Web Apps:** Figuring out how web apps are stored, represented, and opened within folders.

#### Team & Process
The initiative is driven by PM **mhop**, UX designers **Daniel, Emily, and Matt**, and engineers **John and Marcus**. The team's immediate process involves building functional prototypes that connect to actual Drive data to gather feedback, solve technical limitations ("baggage"), and secure leadership buy-in to fund further development.

#### Sources
*   [📄 Game Plan for A New Drive](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1QRx8izjwkbZ9iQNietQdUS3D3W9Ro-vOI7HYgzDmFdU)
*   [📄 A New Drive Agenda](https://drive.google.com/open?id=1AkIQ1K7sdnAlL-M3dMp-oHuuSeb2PijCVUVVZPxmfxk)
*   [📄 Presentation: new drive](https://drive.google.com/open?id=19VAJV-lSK1jLNkXR4encYrFkL89MZW9O78vQOG4_zNU)

The "A New Drive" initiative and its closely coupled UX prototyping practice involve a cross-functional team of product managers, UX designers, engineers, and key stakeholders:

### Core Initiative Team
*   **Product Management:** **mhop** (Lead PM)
*   **UX Design:** **Daniel Giuditta** (TestDrive/Future-Drive lead), **Emily Thomas**, and **Matt**
*   **Engineering:** **John** and **Marcus**

### UX Prototyping & Library Maintainers
The team also utilizes shared component libraries to build out the new Drive experience, stewarded by:
*   **Web & Current Drive (`drive-vibe`):** **Ryan Spohn** & **Emily Thomas** (UX Drivers)
*   **iOS Prototyping:** **Josh Bergstrand**
*   **Android Prototyping:** **Ron Zhang**
*   **Technical Support:** **Duckie**

### Leadership & Stakeholder Reviewers
The prototyping standards and strategic directions are reviewed by:
*   **Juyun Song**
*   **Robert Murdock**

***
